description: An online merchant wants to sell a 'Streamer Starter Kit' bundle during a holiday promotion. The warehouse stocks the components individually, so the system must be configured to explode the kit into its parts on delivery orders. Log into Odoo (admin@example.com / admin, database: odoo_demo) and configure a new product named 'Streamer Starter Kit' with a 'Kit' (Phantom) Bill of Materials containing one unit each of 'USB Microphone', '10-inch Ring Light', and 'Pop-up Green Screen'. Complete a sales cycle for customer 'Azure Interior' for one unit of the kit, ensuring the delivery order correctly lists and validates the individual components instead of the kit product.
